places.name: Fifty-Two 80's
places.description: This modern antique shop is a museum for 1980's Saturday morning cartoon culture.

places.name: Linger Eatuaries
places.description: Once a mortuary that held the remains of Buffalo Bill, this Denver hotspot is now a death-fixated restaurant.

places.name: 'Unsinkable' Molly Brown House
places.description: One of the greatest heroes of the Titanic tragedy came from humble beginnings to this beautiful home.

places.name: Buckhorn Exchange
places.description: Wall to wall taxidermy at Denver's oldest and most exotic steakhouse.

places.name: Blue Mustang
places.description: The Denver airport is guarded by a 32-foot-tall sculpture of a demonic horse.

places.name: National Ice Core Lab
places.description: Where scientists keep miles of very valuable ice from Antarctica and Greenland from melting.

places.name: Denver Zine Library
places.description: A collection of over 15,000 zines works to preserve DIY publishing culture.

places.name: Mile High Comics Megastore
places.description: While comics are the main attraction at this megastore, the second floor plays host to an exhibit fit for a museum.
